ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-24-2018. THE AUG-29-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-06-2019 CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH OCT-07-2019. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON AUG-06-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2019 CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH JUL-03-2019. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON APR-30-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-07-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-07-2020 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ANDRES CHAVEZ FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-06-2019 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-23-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JEREMY FANCHER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-05-2019 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-21-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, ANDRES
ARBITRATOR BRUCE EDWARD KRELL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-24-2018 THROUGH DEC-23-2018.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, ANDRES

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ANDRES CHAVEZ FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-05-2019 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-21-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-30-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-05-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-07-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON NOV-05-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** ***NOTICE: NOTICE OF REFERRAL TO STATE BAR IF PLAINTIFF JEREMY FANCHER DOES NOT APPEAR.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Court orders plaintiff attorney Jeremy Bryan Fancher referred to California State Bar. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Continued To Jan-07-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Sanction all counsel. This matter is referred to the State Bar for non-payment of sanctions if plaintiff JEREMY FANCHER does not appear. Arbitration order to Show Cause continued to JAN-07-2020. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).***
Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Continued To Nov-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. The Order to Show Cause re Arbitration is re-set to NOV-11-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. Jurisditction is extended to OCT/7/2019. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. Self-represented defendant is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. Judge: GARRET L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Continued To Aug-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff's counsel and self represented defendant are sanctions $400.00 each. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Aug-06-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. Jurisdiction of arbitrator is extended to Jul-03-2019. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Arbitrator Assigned Directly
